/leonardo/prod/opt/compilers/cuda/12.6/none/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler -ccbin=/leonardo/prod/spack/06/install/0.22/linux-rhel8-icelake/gcc-8.5.0/gcc-12.2.0-lkcazt4letxjj4s7nlhzryoyivevsatz/bin/g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "--generate-code=arch=compute_52,code=[compute_52,sm_52]" -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink --options-file CMakeFiles/test_bootstrap.dir/deviceObjects1.rsp -o CMakeFiles/test_bootstrap.dir/cmake_device_link.o --options-file CMakeFiles/test_bootstrap.dir/deviceLinkLibs.rsp
